data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of reconciliation/versioning for spend corrections, as stated in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the existence of reconciliation or versioning mechanisms for spend corrections. The absence of concrete API reads or persisted state checks demonstrating this functionality leads to a clear gap in meeting the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of reconciliation/versioning for spend corrections.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for reconciliation/versioning
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete API calls that verify the existence of reconciliation/versioning for spend corrections.
